title: rubus lejeunei var. exacutatus
intro: Rubus lejeunei var. exacutatus, also known as the American dewberry, is a type of raspberry plant that belongs to the Rubus genus. It is a perennial shrub native to North America, known for its edible fruits and medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against cell damage. Rubus lejeunei var. exacutatus can be prepared into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often used to support digestive health, relieve menstrual cramps, and promote overall well-being.
